steps.title: Scale the given expression
steps.content:
The requested expression is $4$ times the left side of the given equation:
$$
4(6x+3)=24x+12
$$

steps.title: Multiply the equation by four
steps.content: Since $6x+3=18$, multiplying both sides by $4$ gives $$ 24x+12=4(18)=72 $$ The answer is B.
